blockingIssues.description: compareQuotes() recommendation logic compares output amounts in targetOut mode (higher output wins), but targetOut comparisons should optimize for lower required input. This makes provider recommendation incorrect in targetOut mode, including gas-adjusted branches.
recommendation_reason text always describes 'more output', which is incorrect for targetOut mode and should instead explain lower required input.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/quick-fixes-scrutiny-notes.md capturing factual milestone updates (DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS/static tokenlist path, mode param, and Curve reverse-quote method name).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update API endpoint parameter docs for /quote and /compare to include `mode` (`exactIn`/`targetOut`) and document targetOut semantics in recommendation wording expectations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature reverse-quote-targetout-support introduced mode support, but AGENTS.md endpoint docs still list only chainId/from/to/amount/slippageBps/sender.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention requiring OpenAPI updates whenever endpoint params or response fields change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: reverse-quote-targetout-support changed API surface (mode, input_amount/mode usage) without openapi.yaml updates.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For CSS/UI changes, explicitly require checking .factory/library/color-system.md and preserving documented focus-outline and palette conventions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: slippage-submit-row-redesign temporarily regressed focus outline width to 2px; corrected later by another feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document dynamic-text button sizing convention: buttons that change label text must define min-width for the longest expected label.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: button-size-consistency had to retrofit min-width for primary/small/tx buttons to prevent visual resize jitter.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Avoid brittle absolute line-number references in monolithic files and prefer symbol/section anchors; also correct Curve reverse-quote method name to `curve.router.required(...)`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews reported line-number drift and reverse-quote docs referencing swapRequired instead of the actual required API.

rejectedObservations.observation: Class-name coupling between .slippage-preset-btn and later .slippage-preset-compact rename.
WETH_ADDRESSES extraction duplicates an older AGENTS.md note about ETH output helpers.
Two-session handoff pattern on amount-field-own-row indicates broken-state transfer.
